name: 80K Hours Upskilling Resources
current_details: Curated list of 67 resources for technical AI safety skill development.

name: 80K Hours AI Safety Career Review
current_details: In-depth career guide with salary data, fit assessment, and strategic advice for AI safety researchers.

name: AISafety.com Events & Training
current_details: Directory of workshops, conferences, and training programs in AI safety.

name: AISafety.com Self-Study
current_details: Curated self-study materials for Technical AI Safety and Frontier AI Governance.

name: Apart Research Hackathons
current_details: Regular alignment research sprints. Great for building portfolio, meeting collaborators, and quick research contributions.

name: BlueDot Impact
current_details: Free 12-week AI safety courses (Technical + Policy tracks). 4,000+ alumni community. Also runs mentor matching via BlueDot Connect.

name: MATS Slack #opportunities
current_details: Contract work, facilitation gigs, paper reviews, and collaboration opportunities from the MATS community.

name: Outsider's Roadmap to AI Safety (LessWrong)
current_details: Comprehensive guide for breaking into AI safety research. Great to share with interested peers.

name: Anthropic Fellows Program
current_details: 4-month program. $3,850/week + ~$15K/mo compute. Scalable oversight, interpretability, adversarial robustness. US, UK, or Canada work authorization required. No PhD needed.

name: CAIS AI & Society Fellowship
current_details: 3 months in SF. $25K stipend + travel + meals. Social/policy focus.

name: ERA Fellowship (Cambridge)
current_deadline: Winter 2026 closed — sign up for next round
current_details: 8 weeks fully funded. Competitive stipend + lodging. Technical safety & governance.

name: Global AI Safety Fellowship
current_deadline: 2025 cycle closed — express interest for next iteration
current_details: Up to 6 months at FAR.AI, CHAI, Conjecture, UK AISI. Up to $30K.

name: Iliad Intensive / Fellowship
current_deadline: April 2026 Intensive closed — check site for future cohorts
current_details: Intensive: 1-month math intro to alignment. Travel + housing covered. London. Fellowship: 3 months, $6K–$15K stipend. June–Aug 2026.

name: MATS (ML Alignment Theory Scholars)
current_deadline: Summer 2026 (June–Aug) apps closed — Autumn 2026 apps open late April
current_details: 12-week in-person research program. $15K stipend + $12K compute + private housing + catered meals. 120 fellows, 100 mentors. Berkeley & London. 5 streams. ~70% receive 6–12 month extensions.

name: Pivotal Research Fellowship
current_deadline: Current cohort (Feb–April 2026) in progress; check for Q3/Autumn 2026 applications
current_details: 9 weeks in London. £6K–8K stipend + accommodation + compute. ~70% get extensions up to 6 months.

name: Second Look Research (UChicago XLab)
current_details: Replicate load-bearing AI safety papers. Contact zroe@uchicago.edu for details.

name: SPAR
current_deadline: Spring 2026 in progress — check for fall cycle
current_details: 3-month remote, part-time (5–40 hrs/wk). Compute covered. $7K in Demo Day prizes.

name: Coefficient Giving — Transition Grants
current_details: Career transitions into AI safety. Covers study, internships, training. Case-by-case amounts. Global.

name: Coefficient Giving — Technical AI Safety RFP
current_details: $50K–$5M per grant. ~$40M total across 21 research areas.

name: Foresight Institute AI Nodes
current_details: Grants + office/community space in SF and Berlin (Berlin opening April 1, 2026).

name: Long-Term Future Fund (LTFF)
current_details: EA Funds. Wide range: $5K–$120K+. Technical research, policy, infrastructure. 6–8 week response.

name: Manifund Regranting
current_details: Expert regrantors with $100K+ budgets each. $5K–$50K typical grants. Can fund in under 1 week.

name: Schmidt Sciences — Trustworthy AI RFP
current_details: Up to $5M per grant (Tier 1: up to $1M, Tier 2: $1M–$5M). 1–3 year projects + compute.

name: Survival & Flourishing Fund (SFF)
current_details: $20–40M+ total across multiple tracks. Main, Freedom, and Fairness tracks.

name: UK AISI Alignment Project
current_deadline: Applications currently closed; expected to reopen summer 2026
current_details: Up to £1M per project + cloud compute + AISI team support. £27M+ in Round 1.

name: 5050 AI (Fifty Years)
current_deadline: Cohort 3 (London/SF) running March–June 2026; next applications likely late 2026
current_details: 13-week accelerator. No equity, no fees. 340+ alumni, 78 companies, 95% seed raise rate. Mentors from OpenAI, Anthropic, FLI. SF and London (ARIA partnership) cohorts.

name: Catalyze Impact
current_details: 501(c)(3) incubator. ~15 orgs incubated, majority raised 6–7 figures. Co-founder matching, stipends, seed funding access.

name: Halcyon Futures
current_details: Nonprofit incubator + Halcyon Ventures fund (~$20M). 1,000+ community. Helped launch 20+ orgs (e.g., Goodfire, Transluce) backed by $350M+ collectively.

name: ImpactOps
current_details: Operations support and incubation for high-impact organizations.

name: Rethink Priorities Special Projects
current_details: Fiscal sponsorship and operational support for new research projects.

name: Seldon Lab
current_deadline: Batch 2 in progress — check for Batch 3
current_details: AI safety startup accelerator. Batch 1: $10M+ raised collectively, sold to xAI & Anthropic. Non-dilutive funding via SFF. Focus: alignment infrastructure, zero-trust AI, autonomous cyber defense.

name: WorkStream
current_details: Nonprofit incorporation and operations support for new organizations.

name: 80,000 Hours Job Board
current_details: ~810 high-impact jobs. ~105 AI roles/month. CAIS, OpenAI, FAR AI, DeepMind, and many more.

name: AISafety.com Jobs
current_details: Dedicated AI safety job board. Research, policy, ops, infosec, SWE, legal. Entry to senior level. Full-time, part-time, internships.

name: Center for AI Safety (CAIS)
current_details: Direct hiring page for CAIS research and operations positions.

name: FAR AI Careers
current_details: Research positions focused on trustworthy and beneficial AI systems.

name: MATS Alumni Hiring Database
current_details: Internal database connecting MATS alumni with hiring organizations.

name: MATS Careers (Staff Hiring)
current_details: Open roles on the MATS team itself (operations, program staff, etc.).

name: What AI Safety Orgs Want in a Hire
current_details: Survey of 38 org leaders on what they look for. Great prep resource for applications.

name: Apollo Research
current_details: Deceptive AI detection. No internship — mentors through MATS & LASR. Expression of interest form available. London + DC.

name: Beneficial AI Foundation
current_details: Max Tegmark's nonprofit. Research Scientist ($70K–$180K), Full Stack Engineer ($40/hr). Remote or MIT Cambridge.

name: Forethought
current_details: Expression of interest open (no deadline). Oxford or Berkeley, remote negotiable.

name: Goodfire
current_details: Interpretability startup. Full-time, in-person roles. No current internship. Backed by Juniper Ventures.

name: Gray Swan AI
current_details: AI safety evaluation & red-teaming. No current internship. Join their Talent Newsletter for future postings.

name: LawZero
current_details: Nonprofit safety lab (Yoshua Bengio). Raised $30M. 8 full-time roles in Montreal. ML Research Scientists, Developers, Engineers.

name: METR (formerly ARC Evals)
current_details: AI evaluation. Full-time roles only: MTS Research $250K–$450K. Berkeley, on-site.

name: MIRI TGT Research Fellowship
current_deadline: Jan 2026 closed — register for next round
current_details: 8 weeks, $1,200/wk. Remote + 1-week Berkeley kickoff. Register interest for future cohorts.

name: Redwood Research
current_details: Leading AI safety lab. No direct internship — mentors through MATS. Check careers page for full-time roles.

name: SAIF (Safe AI Forum)
current_deadline: Listed roles closed — check for new postings
current_details: AI safety forum. Current listed roles (Events Associate, Operations) are closed. Check page for future openings.

name: Simplex
current_details: Computational Mechanics for interpretability. Hiring Research Scientists. Bay Area & London.

name: Transluce
current_details: AI transparency org. No current internship. May post periodically on AISafety.com.

name: WhiteBox Research Fellowship
current_details: Interpretability/safety upskilling. SE Asia focused. Virtual or in-person (Philippines). $200 completion reward.

name: aisafety.com/funding
current_details: Comprehensive, regularly updated directory of all AI safety funding including academic support.

name: Cooperative AI PhD Fellowship
current_details: Up to $40K/yr for up to 3 years. Cooperative AI and safety topics. 240 applicants in 2026 cohort.

name: Cooperative AI Research Fellowship (Cape Town)
current_deadline: Applications closed — check website for next cycle
current_details: 3 months in Cape Town. $3K/mo + flights, housing, office, meals, compute. Great for junior researchers.

name: FLI AI Safety PhD Advisor Directory
current_details: Find faculty advisors working on AI existential safety at universities worldwide.

name: PIBBSS x Iliad Research Residency
current_details: 6-week residency for math researchers. $6K–$15K. London or remote. Mentorship + post-residency funding support.

name: Schmidt Sciences AI2050
current_details: Multi-year awards for Early Career & Senior Fellows. 2025 cohort: 28 scholars, $18M+ total. Nomination-based only — cannot directly apply.

name: Vitalik Buterin PhD Fellowship (FLI)
current_details: 5-year PhD. Full tuition + $40K/yr stipend + $10K/yr research fund. US/UK/Canada universities. Strongly technical focus.

name: Americans for Responsible Innovation
current_deadline: Check ARI careers page for current openings
current_details: AI policy nonprofit. Washington, DC. Check careers page for current open roles.

name: CNAS Nye Internship
current_deadline: Current posting — see department-specific start dates
current_details: 6 months full-time at leading national security think tank. $1,900/mo + $75/mo transport. AI policy, tech & security. Washington, DC, in-person.

name: CSET Summer Internship (Georgetown)
current_details: 10 weeks. AI, cybersecurity, biotech policy. Competitive wage + living stipend + housing + travel. Washington, DC.

name: GovAI Summer Fellowship
current_deadline: Summer 2026 closed — check for next cycle
current_details: 3 months in London. £12K stipend + travel + lunch. Research and Applied tracks. Highly selective. Visa sponsorship available.

name: Horizon Fellowship
current_details: Up to 2 years. Congressional, Think Tank, Executive Branch tracks. $75K–$113K/yr + $15K health + relocation. Washington, DC.

name: IAPS AI Policy Fellowship
current_details: 3 months. $15K (Fellows) / $22K (Senior). Healthcare + prof dev. Write policy briefs, brief government officials. 2-week DC residency + remote. International welcome.

name: RAND CAST Fellows
current_details: AI security & tech policy research. $40K–$200K/yr + health/dental. 6 months to 3 years, full- or part-time. US or UK. Security clearance eligible.

name: Tarbell AI Journalism Fellowship
current_details: 1 year. $60K–$110K. 10-week course + 9-month newsroom placement (Bloomberg, TIME, MIT Tech Review, etc.).

name: Andon Labs — Summer 2026 Role
current_deadline: Check YC jobs page for current listing
current_details: YC W24 startup (Safe Autonomous Organizations). $5K–$6K/mo. San Francisco or Stockholm. Short-term staff role.

name: ARC Visiting Researcher
current_details: Year-round visiting researcher positions (~10 weeks). Strong theoretical background in math, physics, or CS. Berkeley, CA.

name: CAIS Research Engineer Intern (Fall 2026)
current_deadline: Currently posted — check Lever for deadline
current_details: Full-time paid internship. Trojans, adversarial robustness, machine ethics. $9K–$19.2K stipend. San Francisco.

name: CHAI Internship (UC Berkeley)
current_deadline: 2026 apps closed — check for next cycle
current_details: 12–16 weeks. $5K/mo in-person, $3.5K/mo remote. Most interns produce first-author papers.

name: CLR Summer Research Fellowship
current_details: 8-week fellowship on s-risks & technical AI safety. £4,925/mo + travel/visa. Mentored research project. London, in-person. Summer 2026.

name: Constellation Astra Fellowship
current_deadline: Expression of interest open for future cohorts
current_details: 3–6 months. Fully funded: stipend + up to $15K/mo compute + visa support + meals. Berkeley, in-person.

name: DeepMind Student Researcher
current_deadline: Program page — check Google Careers for current openings
current_details: 12–24 week paid research placements for BSc/MSc/PhD students, in person at a Google office.

name: LASR Labs — Summer 2026
current_details: 13-week AI safety research program. £11K stipend + food, office, travel. Produce a paper + blog post. Alumni at UK AISI, Apollo, Leap Labs. London, in-person, full-time. July–October 2026.

name: OpenAI Emerging Talent
current_deadline: Program page — check for current openings
current_details: Internships, residencies, and full-time roles for early-career talent. Check current openings on the page.

current_details: Mechanistic interpretability lab (Khosla Ventures). San Francisco, on-site.
